message: It's live. We actually did this.
Yeah. We did. Now let's make sure nobody finds a typo in the first hour.
A typo would be so on brand for us right now - someone refresh the page obsessively for the next thirty minutes?
I'll check it. Someone has to.

The lamination copy has that same obsessive energy - I've been staring at it for an hour and now I'm seeing problems that aren't there. Want me to refresh the live site instead while you focus on actual content?
I'll handle the site refresh - you stay on content. Go make sure the recipe reads the way we fought for it to read.
